name: Extra Good Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet. Add onion and sauté until tender.
2. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt. Blend egg, oil, and milk into the flour mixture, mixing lightly.
3. Stir in cottage cheese and sautéed onions. Pour batter into a buttered 9-inch round cake pan.
4. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese and poppy seeds.
5. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot and cut into wedges.
